questions.question: Which is the largest district in Odisha by area?
questions.explanation: Mayurbhanj is the largest district in Odisha by area.

questions.question: Which river is the longest in Odisha?
questions.explanation: Mahanadi is the longest river flowing through Odisha.

questions.question: Which festival is famous for the Rath Yatra in Odisha?
questions.explanation: The Rath Yatra festival in Puri is famous worldwide and is a major festival in Odisha.

questions.question: Which tribal community is predominantly found in the Mayurbhanj district?
questions.explanation: The Santal tribe is predominantly found in Mayurbhanj district.

questions.question: Who was the famous Odia poet known for the 'Geohera Pora'?
questions.explanation: 'Kabisurya Baladeba Rath' was renowned for his poetry including 'Geohera Pora'.

questions.question: Which is the ancient capital of Odisha during the Kalinga period?
questions.explanation: Kalinganagara was an important historical city of ancient Odisha during the Kalinga period.

questions.question: Who was the founder of the Maurya Empire in India?
questions.explanation: Chandragupta Maurya founded the Maurya Empire around 321 BCE.

questions.question: Which ancient university was situated in Takshashila?
questions.explanation: Takshashila (Taxila) was an eminent ancient university famous for higher learning.

questions.question: Which Mughal emperor built the Taj Mahal?
questions.explanation: Shah Jahan commissioned the construction of the Taj Mahal.

questions.question: Which Indian cultural festival is celebrated to mark the harvest season in Punjab?
questions.explanation: Baisakhi is a harvest festival celebrated mainly in Punjab.

questions.question: Which mountain range forms the northern boundary of India?
questions.explanation: The Himalayas form the northern boundary of India.

questions.question: Which soil type is predominantly found in Odisha?
questions.explanation: Odisha mainly has laterite soil in many parts.

questions.question: Which mineral is most abundantly found in the Bondi basin of Odisha?
questions.explanation: Odisha is rich in coal deposits, especially in the Bondi basin.

questions.question: Which dam in Odisha is built across the Mahanadi river?
questions.explanation: Hirakud Dam is constructed across the Mahanadi river.

questions.question: Which of the following is a Fundamental Right in India?
questions.explanation: Right to Education is a Fundamental Right under the Indian Constitution.

questions.question: How many members are there in the Rajya Sabha?
questions.explanation: The Rajya Sabha has a maximum of 245 members as per the Constitution.

questions.question: Who is the current Speaker of the Lok Sabha?
questions.explanation: Om Birla has been serving as the Speaker of the Lok Sabha since 2019.

questions.question: Which article of the Indian Constitution deals with the Directive Principles of State Policy?
questions.explanation: Article 37 of the Indian Constitution deals with Directive Principles.

questions.question: Which gas is most responsible for the greenhouse effect?
questions.explanation: Carbon dioxide traps heat in the atmosphere, leading to the greenhouse effect.

questions.question: What is the pH range of an acid?
questions.explanation: An acid has a pH less than 7.

questions.question: Which vitamin is primarily obtained from sunlight?
questions.explanation: Vitamin D is synthesized when skin is exposed to sunlight.

questions.question: Which disease is caused by a deficiency of Vitamin C?
questions.explanation: Deficiency of Vitamin C causes Scurvy.

questions.question: What comes next in the series: 2, 4, 8, 16, ?
questions.explanation: The series doubles each time; next is 32.

questions.question: If in a certain code, 'ODISHA' is written as 'PEJTIP', what is the code for 'REPUBLIC'?
questions.explanation: The pattern involves shifting each letter by a certain number; based on the code, 'REPUBLIC' follows the same pattern as 'ODISHA'.

questions.question: If 'MANGO' is written as 'NBOHP', how is 'APPLE' written?
questions.explanation: Each letter shifts forward by one in the alphabet with an alternating pattern.

questions.question: A person facing north walks 10 meters, turns right, walks 5 meters, then turns left and walks 5 meters. Which direction is he facing now?
questions.explanation: He ends up facing East after the movements described.

questions.question: Who is the current President of India?
questions.explanation: Droupadi Murmu has been the President since 25 July 2022.

questions.question: Which scheme was launched by the Government of India to promote digital payments?
questions.explanation: 'Cashless India' aims to promote digital payments across the country.

questions.question: Which athlete won the gold medal in the Tokyo 2020 Olympics for India in badminton?
questions.explanation: P.V. Sindhu won the silver medal, but India’s first gold in badminton was by P.V. Sindhu in Tokyo 2020.

questions.question: Who was awarded the Padma Vibhushan in 2023 for contributions in science?
questions.explanation: Dr. C.N.R. Rao was awarded the Padma Vibhushan in 2023 for his contributions to science.
